transcript: I have a client pitch at 10am tomorrow in NYC. I'm thinking about wearing this oxford shirt. Build me a complete outfit and tell me if it's right for the weather.

outfit_recommendations.name: The Classic Pitch

items.description: Your crisp white oxford shirt will be the perfect base.
Grey wool trousers provide a sharp, professional foundation.
Layer with the navy wool blazer to create a timeless and authoritative business look.
Brown leather derby shoes will complete the polished, classic aesthetic.
For your commute, the beige trench coat is essential. It's stylish and will protect you from the cool air and potential rain.
A brown leather belt to match your shoes.

outfit_recommendations.why: This outfit is a masterclass in smart-casual and minimalist style. The navy blazer and grey trousers are a can't-miss combination for a formal pitch, and the trench coat ensures you'll arrive looking unflustered, regardless of the April weather.

reasoning_summary: For your formal client pitch, we'll build a classic, professional look using your existing pieces that's also perfectly layered for NYC's cool, overcast weather with a chance of rain.
shopping_suggestions: A quality brown leather belt to match your derby shoes is a must-have for tying this formal look together.
do_dont: Do make sure your shirt is impeccably ironed. Details matter!
Do add a classic, understated watch to complete the look.
Don't forget an umbrella; rain becomes very likely in the afternoon.
Don't wear the trench coat during the pitch itself; check it when you arrive.
spoken_reply: That white oxford shirt is a perfect choice for your pitch tomorrow. I'd pair it with your grey wool trousers and navy blazer for a sharp, confident look. The forecast is cool with a chance of rain, so your trench coat is the ideal top layer for navigating the city—you'll arrive looking polished and ready to win them over.
